data.title: Advanced Lateral Flow Conference prepares for 2025 event with visionary keynotes; agenda announced.
data.description: A significant diagnostics event in LA JOLLA, California, on September 18, 2025, highlighted visionary keynotes and industry insights. The Advanced Lateral Flow Conference (ALFC), a leading global event for rapid diagnostics, unveiled its comprehensive agenda for 2025. The conference promises to offer valuable information and networking opportunities to its attendees.

data.title: Balchem showcases Vitamin K2 at FC Bayern Women’s season opener, starting direct-to-consumer sales.
data.description: Balchem, a renowned global manufacturer of specialty ingredients for human nutrition, recently unveiled its maiden direct-to-consumer venture from Montvale, New Jersey. The initiative marks an important shift in the company's strategy, offering their products directly to customers for the first time. This move is expected to significantly impact their distribution channels and consumer reach.

data.title: Report shows Japan leading in reducing tobacco-related deaths with safer nicotine alternatives, inspiring global model.Character count: 109.
data.description: In Tokyo, global health experts are urging Japan to maintain its role in spearheading the effort to decrease the significant impact of tobacco use. A recent report from Smoke Free Sweden reveals that safer nicotine alternatives have led to a decrease in smoking rates, better health outcomes, and present a potential blueprint for other countries to emulate. The report, titled "The Safer Nicotine Revolution: Global Lessons, Healthier Futures," showcases Japan as a standout illustration of how reduced-risk products can revolutionize public health. The findings underscore the success of these alternatives in combatting smoking-related harms and advocate for their wider adoption.

data.title: Sure Med Compliance appoints Dr. Steven D. Passik, PhD, as Chief Clinical Officer to advance pain and addiction services nationwide.
data.description: Today, in Fairhope, Alabama on September 18, 2025, Sure Med Compliance, a company specializing in risk mitigation and compliance services for pain management providers, revealed the selection of Steven D. Passik, PhD, as their new Chief Clinical Officer. Dr. Passik has been appointed to aid in the expansion of the company's services.

data.title: Krispy Krunchy Chicken partners with Cumberland Farms, opening 5 locations in Florida, starting with Santa Rosa Beach.
data.description: Atlanta-based fast food chain Krispy Krunchy Chicken has partnered with convenience, coffee, and fuel retailer EG America to open new locations within Cumberland Farms stores. The agreement will see the launch of five Krispy Krunchy Chicken outlets in the Florida panhandle, with the primary store being in Santa Rosa Beach at 3871 E County Highway 30A. Krispy Krunchy Chicken is recognized as one of the fastest-growing concepts in the convenience store industry in the US. The collaboration is expected to enhance the food offerings at Cumberland Farms locations and provide customers with more dining options.

data.title: Greenworks releases 35 new hand and power tools expanding DIY lineup, available online and nationwide.
data.description: A wide range of battery-powered tools are now accessible both online and at retailers across the country. Greenworks, a renowned company in battery-powered outdoor power equipment, has introduced a collection of 35 new hand and power tools. The launch took place on September 18, 2025, in Mooresville, North Carolina. This expanded selection provides consumers with more options to choose from when it comes to eco-friendly tools powered by batteries.

data.title: BRV Capital invests in Zettabyte, launches "TITAN" AIDC project; Zettabyte: leading GPU solutions; global tech private equity firm; Sept. 18, 2025.
data.description: Today in San Francisco, Zettabyte, a top provider of GPU infrastructure solutions, revealed a new strategic investment from BRV Capital, a renowned global technology private equity firm. This investment signifies a critical stage in the expansion of Zettabyte's operations, highlighting their growing influence in the industry.

data.title: SecureSave surpasses $100 million in Emergency Savings Accounts contributions, aiding 400,000+ financial emergencies. Top reasons: inflation, car expenses, home repair.
data.description: SecureSave, a prominent workplace Emergency Savings Accounts (ESAs) provider, has supported individuals in managing more than 400,000 financial emergencies. Inflation, car expenses, and home repair are identified as the primary reasons driving the utilization of these accounts. The company's recent announcement highlights their significant impact on individuals facing financial challenges.

data.title: Mission Space and Starcloud form alliance to integrate space weather data into AI compute platform.
data.description: In Miami on September 18, 2025, Mission Space, a company specializing in space weather intelligence, revealed a new partnership with Starcloud, a provider of orbital data centers. This collaboration will involve the integration of live space weather intelligence into Starcloud's orbital AI compute platform. This move signifies an important step forward in enhancing the capabilities of both companies and advancing technology within the space industry.
Putin meets with parliamentary faction leaders

data.title: Advent Technologies (NASDAQ: ADN) gets major MEA order from top European transport power firm.
data.description: A milestone has been reached by Advent Technologies Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADN) as their subsidiary, Advent Technologies, SA, secured a substantial purchase order from a prominent European transportation energy firm. This order is for the provision of Advent's exclusive Membrane Electrode Assemblies (MEA). The deal marks a noteworthy accomplishment for the company in expanding its market presence and signifies a positive development in the realm of innovative energy solutions.
US Philly Fed Business Index September 2025 Report

data.title: Clean Harbors' study shows success in incinerating PFAS, surpassing EPA standards. Key findings of latest PFAS study announced by company.
data.description: Norwell, Massachusetts-based Clean Harbors, Inc. (NYSE: CLH) - a top environmental and industrial services provider in North America - disclosed positive outcomes from its recent PFAS study. The study validated that the company's commercial incineration facilities, operating at high temperatures and holding RCRA permits, can effectively eliminate various types of PFAS (per- and poly-fluorinated alkyl substances). PFAS, known as "forever chemicals," present notable human health risks.

data.title: Det-Tronics appoints Johannes Mario Kahlert from Spectrum Safety Solutions as President, based in Minnesota headquarters.
data.description: Det-Tronics, a renowned company specializing in fire and gas safety systems, has appointed Johannes Mario Kahlert as the new President. Mario will now not only head Det-Tronics but also become a part of the Spectrum Safety Solutions Executive Leadership Team, and will be stationed at the company's global headquarters located in Bloomington, Minnesota. In his new position, Mario will take on complete business responsibilities and guide the worldwide team at Det-Tronics as they expedite their growth efforts.

data.title: Barnes & Noble College introduces Room Service for college students, making shopping and moving in easier and stress-free.
data.description: Barnes & Noble College recently introduced a new service called Room Service, aimed at simplifying the shopping and moving-in process for college students. This initiative aims to reduce stress and make it easier for students to settle in their new living quarters.
Trump and Starmer sign tech deal at Chequers

data.title: Ida Byrd-Hill's Culture Re-Wired reduces MIT GenAI pilot failures by 95%. Culture key to success in AI.
data.description: In a recent report from MIT, it was found that a staggering 95% of generative AI projects in companies are not successful. According to Ida Byrd-Hill, an expert in the field, the reason behind this high failure rate is the cultural aspect of Artificial Intelligence. She emphasizes that the culture within a company plays a crucial role in determining whether AI projects become successful "gold mines" or end up being costly "money pits." Byrd-Hill's observation underscores the significance of addressing cultural factors when implementing AI technologies in organizations.

data.title: Adsposure partners with GoDurham to provide advertising services on buses in Durham, NC. First ad promotes NC Museum of Natural Sciences' Blue Whales Exhibition.
data.description: Adsposure, in collaboration with GoDurham and the City of Durham, has been appointed as the exclusive provider of advertising services on GoDurham buses. The partnership was officially announced by GoDurham on September 18, 2025, in Durham, North Carolina. This agreement designates Adsposure as the Transit Advertising People in charge of advertising services on GoDurham buses.

data.title: LightPath Technologies (NASDAQ: LPTH) to host Q4 fiscal 2025 earnings call on Sept 25 at 5:00pm Eastern Time. #ORLANDO #PRNewswire
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on September 18, 2025, LightPath Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: LPTH) revealed plans to disclose its financial results. LightPath is renowned for its cutting-edge optics and imaging solutions catering to defense and commercial sectors. This announcement signifies a significant development for the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary advises investing in Bitcoin and Ethereum to capture the majority of crypto market volatility, avoiding irrelevant tokens.
data.description: In a recent interview, renowned investor Kevin O'Leary, also known as "Mr. Wonderful," advised that focusing on owning only Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) can effectively harness the majority of the cryptocurrency market's volatility and yield. O'Leary emphasized the point by stating that by holding onto Bitcoin and Ethereum, individuals could potentially capture over 90% of the alpha or price volatility in the entire crypto market. He discouraged investors from chasing after numerous "irrelevant" tokens in the market and suggested that concentrating on the two major cryptocurrencies could help investors fulfill the promise of cryptocurrency. O'Leary shared his insights in a clip posted on X from his interview with Al Arabiya English. His advice is summarized as: "Don't chase irrelevant tokens, focus on Bitcoin and Ethereum to capture the promise of cryptocurrency." For those seeking to tap into the potential of the crypto market, O'Leary recommended owning these two securities as a strategic approach, as detailed in a full story available on Benzinga.com.
